Uses of Enum Class
me.itzloghotxd.nbt.TagType

Packages that use TagType
Package
Description
me.itzloghotxd.nbt
Provides the core classes and interfaces for the Named Binary Tag (NBT) library.
me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags
Contains concrete implementations of Tag representing all currently supported Named Binary Tag (NBT) types.

    Description
    abstract @NotNull TagType
    AbstractTag.getType()
    Gets the type of this tag.
    @NotNull TagType
    Tag.getType()
    Gets the type of this tag.
    static @NotNull TagType
    TagType.getTypeById(int id)
    Returns the TagType associated with the given ID.
    static TagType
    TagType.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static TagType[]
    TagType.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in me.itzloghotxd.nbt with parameters of type TagType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Tag<?>
    TagType.createByType(TagType type)
    Creates a new, instance of a Tag corresponding to the specified TagType with its corresponding value and empty name.
